title: Clumsy Factorial
hints: Notice that multiplication and division bind tighter than addition and subtraction, so the expression naturally breaks into small chunks separated by + or -.
Group terms by the operators: you can compute the first chunk (N * (N-1) / (N-2)) directly, then handle subsequent + and - operations with similar 3-number chunks.
The result is essentially the first chunk plus a sum of small adjustments. For N >= 5, the answer follows a simple pattern relative to N, so check small values to find it.
